column1: # Strain2bScan vs StrainScan, per-sample profiling on the C. acnes 64-genome panel.
# STRAND-FIXED binary (both-strand digestion, ~2x markers). Strain2bScan re-measured on 5
# simulated strain-mixture mocks (the real MockMetagenomes reads are no longer available);
# StrainScan side unchanged (its pipeline was unaffected by our strand bug). 16-core arm64 macOS.
# Strain2bScan ~6x faster and ~7x lighter per sample. The speed edge is smaller than the pre-fix
# ~14x because both-strand digestion doubles the marker set (correctness over raw speed; the 2x
# could be recovered later by making the enzyme patterns frame one canonical tag per site). The
# memory gap is unchanged and structural: streamed sparse 2b markers (~115 MB) vs jellyfish
